ground_truth.title: Graphic Design Courses - Conejo Valley Adult Education
ground_truth.main_content:
Learn to use Photoshop Elements to show them off! Fix your photos, add artistic effects, and even combine images with Photoshop Elements! Note: Digital Photo Basics, Computer Basics, or some basic computer skills required.

Video Basics & Creation for Beginners: Take your photographs and video footage from your phone, digital camera, or printed stills and compose these into memorable video presentations. Learn the terminology, best practices, and tips from an experienced instructor using free software for Windows, Mac OSX, Linux, and Google Chrome based computers! You will also learn how to create, edit and use your own voice to narrate the videos that you compose with free available software tools. From weddings, family, travel, business, and adventure, all of us have memories captured in photos and videos. Learn how to make these come alive in a remarkable presentation!

Adobe Premiere Pro is a video editing application that is utilized by everyone from YouTube to cable news networks to Academy Award-nominated blockbusters. Students must have a basic understanding of computers. It would be advantageous if you had some prior familiarity with Adobe software, but it is not needed.

Participants will start from scratch in Premiere Pro. Learn to import clips from diverse sources and incorporate content from other Adobe tools such as Illustrator and Photoshop. Arrange video, image, and audio assets before using Premiere Pro's features to harness and integrate these raw resources into a video sequence by cutting clips, adding audio, and generating stylistic transitions. Advanced editing techniques incorporating motion effects will be explored. Editing multi-camera video shoots, producing title sequences, and distributing completed videos for diverse purposes and platforms are among the other topics covered.

Adobe Lightroom Classic: In-person cloud-based program giving you all the tools to create, edit and organize your photos. Allows you the capability of editing hundreds of photos simultaneously. Call to add Adobe Bridge for FREE!
with: You love your photos! Learn to use Photoshop Elements to show them off! Fix your photos, add artistic effects, and even combine images with Photoshop Elements!
Take your photographs and video footage from your phone, digital camera, or printed stills and compose these into memorable video presentations.
Adobe Premiere Pro is a video editing application that is utilized by everyone from YouTube to cable news networks to Academy Award-nominated blockbusters.
Adobe Lightroom Classic is cloud-based program giving you all the tools to create, edit and organize your photos. Allows you the capability of editing hundreds of photos simultaneously.
